backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the access/resource request management system, including user approval flows, role-based access control, user profiles, and domain types for requests, audit logs, and notifications.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with all six page routes under a protected layout wrapper that redirects unauthenticated users to the login page and shows a profile setup modal when needed.
Client-side AI analysis panel that evaluates a request's risk level, cost, and justification to display warnings, suggestions, approval chain, and estimated completion time.
frontend/src/components/AIRiskPanel.tsx: Displays AI-generated compliance risk flags for a request, checking for duplicates, high-risk system access, cost thresholds, and admin-level access.
frontend/src/components/ApprovalActionBu: Renders Approve, Reject, and More Info action buttons for a request, each opening a confirmation dialog with an optional comments textarea that calls the respective mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/ApprovalPolicies: Displays existing approval policies and a form to add new ones, allowing configuration of request type, risk level, and required approver roles via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/ApprovalTimeline: Renders a vertical timeline of approval steps with status icons, timestamps, and comments for a given list of ApprovalStep objects.
frontend/src/components/AuditLogFeed.tsx: Fetches and displays a reverse-chronological audit log feed for a specific request, showing action icons, labels, actor IDs, timestamps, and notes.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotAssistant: A floating chatbot widget that parses natural language input into structured request fields (type, priority, risk level, etc.) and provides example prompts to help users create requests.
frontend/src/components/KPICard.tsx: A reusable card component that displays a KPI metric with a label, value, icon, optional trend indicator, and configurable accent color.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with a collapsible sidebar navigation, user profile dropdown, logout functionality, and admin-only route filtering.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: A bell icon button component that shows a popover list of user notifications with unread count badge, timestamps, and per-notification mark-as-read functionality.
frontend/src/components/NotificationsTab: An admin tab component that lists all users with toggle switches to enable or disable in-app notification preferences per user.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A blocking modal dialog for first-time users to enter their full name and department to create their profile before accessing the app.
A selectable card button component for choosing a request type, displaying an icon, title, and description with teal highlight styling when selected.
frontend/src/components/SLACountdown.tsx: A countdown display component that shows remaining time until an SLA deadline, updating every minute and applying warning/overdue color states.
frontend/src/components/SLARulesTab.tsx: An admin tab for configuring SLA deadline hours per request category, supporting inline editing of existing rules and adding new custom categories.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Renders a styled pill badge for a request status or risk level, mapping known statuses to labeled, color-coded variants.
frontend/src/components/StatusStepper.ts: A horizontal step-progress component that visualizes a request's lifecycle through five stages, with special handling for rejected and more-info-requested statuses.
frontend/src/components/UserManagementTa: React component that displays a table of all users with dropdowns to edit and save their roles, using useListUsers and useAssignUserRole hooks with toast notifications for feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication (login, logout, status) via DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profiles, roles, requests, audit logs, notifications, SLA rules, and approval policies.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including status colors, chart colors, and sidebar variables using OKLCH.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a cn helper that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminConfigPage.tsx: Admin-only page that renders tabbed configuration sections (Users, SLA Rules, Approval Policies, Notifications) with an access guard based on the caller's admin status.
frontend/src/pages/ApprovalsPage.tsx: Displays a filterable list of access requests for admins (all requests) or regular users (their own), with search, status, and risk filters. Includes approval action buttons and a chatbot assistant.
frontend/src/pages/CreateRequestPage.tsx: Multi-step form for submitting new access/resource requests, supporting type selection, detail entry, and AI review, with URL param pre-fill support from the chatbot.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard showing KPI cards, pie/bar charts for request status and category breakdown, and a recent requests table, scoped to the current user or all requests for admins.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with Internet Identity authentication, featuring a branded left panel and a sign-in button on the right, redirecting to the dashboard upon successful login.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Analytics and reporting page with filterable charts for request volume over time, approval rates, and SLA compliance, plus a paginated audit log with CSV export support.
frontend/src/pages/RequestDetailPage.tsx: Detail page for a single request showing status stepper, metadata, SLA countdown, approval timeline, AI risk panel, audit log, and chatbot assistant. Fetches request data by ID and handles loading/error states.
frontend/src/utils/exportUtils.ts: Provides utility functions to export request data as a CSV file download and generate a plain-text print summary with approval statistics.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color palettes (navy, teal, semantic tokens via oklch), typography, border radius, shadows, and animation keyframes for the enterprise UI theme.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the full-stack workplace access request management system (React + FastAPI + SQLite + LangChain), its architecture, existing features, and versioning metadata.
